channel.title: upKeeper Solutions — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by upKeeper Solutions (upkeeper).

item.title: CVE-2026-2450 · 7.4 HIGH
item.description: .NET misconfiguration: use of impersonation vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions upKeeper Instant Privilege Access allows Hijacking a Privileged Thread of Execution.This issue affects upKeeper Instant Privilege Access: through 1.5.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-2449 · 9 CRITICAL
item.description: Improper neutralization of argument delimiters in a command ('argument injection') vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions upKeeper Instant Privilege Access allows Hijacking a Privileged Thread of Execution.This issue affects upKeeper Instant Privilege A…

item.title: CVE-2025-11446 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions upKeeper Manager allows Use of Known Domain Credentials.This issue affects upKeeper Manager: from 5.2.0 before 5.2.12.

item.title: CVE-2025-8663 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions upKeeper Manager allows Use of Known Domain Credentials.This issue affects upKeeper Manager: from 5.0.0 before 5.2.12.

item.title: CVE-2025-4681 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions upKeeper Instant Privilege Access allows Privilege Abuse.This issue affects upKeeper Instant Privilege Access: before 1.4.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-4680 · 8.6 HIGH
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions upKeeper Instant Privilege Access allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels.This issue affects upKeeper Instant Privilege Access: before 1.4.0.

item.title: CVE-2024-9479 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions upKeeper Instant Privilege Access allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects upKeeper Instant Privilege Access: before 1.2.

item.title: CVE-2024-9478 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions upKeeper Instant Privilege Access allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects upKeeper Instant Privilege Access: before 1.2.

item.title: CVE-2024-42466 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Lack of resources and rate limiting - login
item.description: Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions product upKeeper Manager allows Authentication Abuse.This issue affects upKeeper Manager: through 5.1.9.

item.title: CVE-2024-42465 · 9 CRITICAL — Lack of resources and rate limiting - two factor authentication
item.description: Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions product upKeeper Manager allows Authentication Abuse.This issue affects upKeeper Manager: through 5.1.9.

item.title: CVE-2024-42464 · 7.6 HIGH — Leak of user information
item.description: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions product upKeeper Manager allows Utilizing REST's Trust in the System Resource to Obtain Sensitive Data.This issue affects upKeeper Manager: through 5.1.9.

item.title: CVE-2024-42463 · 8.6 HIGH — Leak of organizations messages
item.description: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions product upKeeper Manager allows Utilizing REST's Trust in the System Resource to Obtain Sensitive Data.This issue affects upKeeper Manager: through 5.1.9.

item.title: CVE-2024-42462 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Bypass multifactor authentication
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerability in upKeeper Solutions product upKeeper Manager allows Authentication Bypass.This issue affects upKeeper Manager: through 5.1.9.
